title: Online Catasto of 1427
highlights: Della Catena Map of Florence, ca. 1471-82. (Sopr. Beni Art. Stor. Firenze.) [For a larger more detailed picture  ...    The Online Catasto is a World Wide Web searchable database of tax information for the city of Florence in 1427-29 (c. 10,000 records). It is based on David Herlihy and Christiane Klapisch-Zuber, Principal Investigators, Census and Property Survey of Florentine Dominions in the Province of Tuscany, 1427-14
